_comment: Queue policy for the SQS queue `portal-aws-health-events` in dp-tooling (444455556666, eu-west-1). Allows the EventBridge service (events.amazonaws.com) to sqs:SendMessage into the queue, but ONLY when the call originates from the central bus rule's target (SourceArn = the rule on the portal-aws-health bus) and from this account (SourceAccount). Applied via the Policy attribute on the queue (set-queue-attributes); apply-aws-health-eventbridge.sh injects the real queue ARN. This grants EventBridge -> SQS delivery for the central-bus rule only.
